channel.title: machine girl on chtc
channel.description: Recent content in machine girl on chtc

item.title: GLOBAL FANDEMIC (Split Set)
item.description: The Machine Girl A2B2 Night Of Fire set, split by me (in opus). GLOBAL FANDEMIC DOWNLOAD details Split with FFmpeg, Python and stolen code from Stack Exchange. making of the cover art Downloaded 2 frames (the one with the global fandemic text and one before that) with youtube-dl and FFmpeg (obviously by getting the solution from the internet). Removed most of the background from the frame with the text by using remove.
